# PC-001 session log

## Intent

Replace bounded workspace output defaults with a production-quality universal Desktop artifact
save/export/download router.

## Actions

- Reopened REQ-025 through the plan-change process and recorded ADR-0006.
- Inventoried every Desktop save, export, download, archive, update, and configuration write.
- Implemented one pure resolver, focused React context, Electron save/copy handler, per-window
  native-download config, session-pinned artifact tabs, and Outputs Save Copy.
- Migrated workspace metadata and session exports off direct save/download implementations.
- Ran the workflow/GUI, input/output-path, and concurrency catalog audits and repaired all six
  findings.
- Updated i18n catalogs, user/developer documentation, traceability, defects, risks, and evidence.
- Ran the complete Desktop suite and required Rust/documentation checks.

## Result

PC-001 is complete: 70 Desktop test files / 502 tests pass, typecheck and changed-file lint/format pass,
i18n and documentation builds pass, 26 workspace tests pass, and mandatory clippy is clean.

## Remaining boundary

Independent third-party tools that intentionally write directly to an explicit absolute path do
not traverse the Desktop artifact router. Gosling-owned saves, exports, Outputs copies, and native
downloads do.
